  validateShipmentRequest
    ✓ AC1: returns valid=true and empty errors for a fully valid express request (1 ms)

    ✓ AC2: errors when recipient_name is missing
    ✓ AC2: errors when recipient_name is an empty string
    ✓ AC2: errors when recipient_name is whitespace only (1 ms)
    ✓ AC3: errors when weight_kg is 0
    ✓ AC3: errors when weight_kg is negative
    ✓ AC4: errors when weight_kg is greater than 1000
    ✓ AC4: does NOT error when weight_kg is exactly 1000 (boundary)
    ✓ AC5: errors when shipment_type is express and saturday_delivery is not provided
    ✓ AC5: does NOT error when shipment_type is express and saturday_delivery is false
    ✓ AC6: errors when shipment_type is standard and saturday_delivery is provided (1 ms)
    ✓ AC6: errors when shipment_type is standard and saturday_delivery is false (still provided)
    ✓ AC7: returns ALL errors when recipient_name is missing AND weight_kg is negative
    ✓ AC7: collects three simultaneous errors (missing name, zero weight, express missing saturday_delivery)
